VaniScope Local Documentation

VaniScope is a LangGraph-only browser agent runtime for local web research, evidence capture, reports, and reviews.

Installation Configuration Troubleshooting

Overview

The runtime opens local fixture pages, observes visible text, records evidence, and writes final_report.md, evidence.jsonl, review.json, and tool_audit.jsonl artifacts.

Installation

Install Python dependencies with uv from the repository root.

uv sync

Install browser binaries before running browser tests.

uv run playwright install chromium

Start the FastAPI service for task execution.

uv run python scripts/run_api.py

Start the Next.js control console in a second terminal.

cd apps/web
pnpm install
pnpm dev

Configuration

Configure the console API target with NEXT_PUBLIC_VANISCOPE_API_BASE_URL. For local development, use http://localhost:8000.

Troubleshooting

If the console cannot connect, confirm FastAPI is running and that NEXT_PUBLIC_VANISCOPE_API_BASE_URL points to the API base URL.

If browser tests fail because Chromium is missing, run uv run playwright install chromium again.
